Update logs: Trial Themed Scenario now.

Since Demo 5 Block tales bots are bombing up quite a lut, i decided to make my own Block Tales demo 5 bot.

And we got.. AZURI! I love her i gotta be honest

SCENARIO SUMMARY:

You're in a trial due to rumors of you planning to steal the Windforce.

Hilariously, Instead of General Robur being the Judge, Azuri is replacing him.

You two were childhood friends before you moved away from Tirinity.
